custom_field.name: catalyst_id
custom_field.label: Catalyst Site ID
custom_field.description: Unique Cisco Catalyst Center site identifier linking NetBox site to Catalyst site

custom_field.name: catalyst_location_id
custom_field.label: Catalyst Location ID
custom_field.description: Unique Cisco Catalyst Center location identifier for floor-type sites

custom_field.name: catalyst_device_id
custom_field.label: Catalyst Device ID
custom_field.description: Unique Cisco Catalyst Center device identifier for non-stack devices

custom_field.name: catalyst_serial_number
custom_field.label: Catalyst Serial Number
custom_field.description: Serial number from Cisco Catalyst Center for device or stack member

custom_field.name: catalyst_stack_id
custom_field.label: Catalyst Stack ID
custom_field.description: Cisco Catalyst Center stack identifier for devices that are part of a switch stack

custom_field.name: catalyst_stack_role
custom_field.label: Catalyst Stack Role
custom_field.description: Role of device in switch stack (ACTIVE, STANDBY, MEMBER)
